rules.name: Exact category + item match
rules.description: Invoice category and line-item description map directly to a ledger category and sub-item (including aliases).

rules.name: Within price tolerance
rules.description: Line-item unit price is within ±10% of the ledger expected unit price (or $50 absolute, whichever is greater).

rules.name: Price outside tolerance
rules.description: Line-item unit price deviates from ledger expected by more than R2 tolerance. Requires human review.

rules.name: High value line
rules.description: Line total exceeds $5,000. Always requires human review even if matched on category and item.

rules.name: No ledger item match
rules.description: Category exists but the sub-item is not in the approved ledger item list. Sent to exception queue.

rules.name: No ledger category match
rules.description: Invoice category does not exist in the approved ledger. Sent to exception queue.
